message:
feat(gateway): implement fleet percentile ranking for agent analytics

Adds real implementation for agent percentile ranking against the fleet,
replacing the hardcoded placeholder value.

New functions:
- calculatePercentileRankInDistribution(): Calculates what percentage
  of values in a distribution are below a given value (0-100 scale)
- getFleetSuccessRates(): Batch query for all agent success rates in
  a period with 30-second cache to avoid N+1 query pattern

Changes:
- getSuccessRateMetrics() now calls getFleetSuccessRates() to get all
  agent success rates, then calculates actual percentile rank
- Removes "TODO: Calculate percentile rank vs fleet" placeholder

Performance considerations:
- Uses single batch query instead of per-agent queries
- Results cached for 30 seconds via analyticsCache
- Edge cases handled: empty fleet returns 50 (median), single agent
  returns 50

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
